data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: WhatsApp positions itself as a tool for global communication and connection.
data.technical_spec: Available in multiple languages and localization support.

data.title: Trust and Privacy
data.description: Prioritizes user privacy and secure communication as core values.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption and minimal user data retention policies.

data.title: Reliability and Speed
data.description: Highlights fast and reliable message delivery and platform uptime.
data.technical_spec: Efficient networking and distributed system architecture.

data.title: Simplicity and Usability
data.description: Focus on delivering a simple, user-friendly interface across all devices.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design philosophy and functional efficiency.

data.title: Community and Support
data.description: Emphasizes user community engagement and support availability.
data.technical_spec: Active user forums, FAQs, and round-the-clock customer support.
